titles.text: Final Fantasy VI: A Soldier's Contingency

descriptions.text: A Soldier’s Contingency is a comprehensive gameplay and expansion hack for FFVI, based on the wonderful hack by Fedorajoe/Fauntleroy titled the “General Leo Edition”. In addition to being able to recruit Leo, there are 200+ new monsters, new alternate character sprites, 50+ new battle themes, an entire Gameplay overhaul, dozens of new items, beast hunting, new bosses, over 50 patches/hacks from the community, all major bugs fixed, new spells/skills, smarter AI, new plot twists, and far too much else to list here!
